MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Greg Brockbank, Esq., Marin Law Center, (415) 453-0222, for Plaintiff and Moving Party to be relieved as counsel for Marcia Weiser
Marcia Weiser, Plaintiff, (415) 989-8900, opposing motion

RULING:
A R G U E D; Counsel Gregory R. Brockbank's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MARCIA WEISER PROVISIONALLY GRANTED; Counsel Brockbank is ordered to provide the Court with a verified statement, with service upon Plaintiff by hand delivery or registered or certified mail, that the Motion to Compel currently set for December 16, 2003 has been reset and that Plaintiff's file has been delivered to her. In addition, the Court, on its own motion, will reset the case management conference currently scheduled for December 5, 2003. Counsel to prepare and submit an order to be relieved as counsel. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
